requiredItem.label: 游戏卡带
requiredItem.description: 第一章的实体入口。标签上只印着 7:55。

objectives.system_return_required: 带着道具栏回去找系统
objectives.complete: 前往图书馆寻找系统的朋友

narration.unnamed: 这位同学目前连自己的名字都不知道。
narration.pacing: 他走起来了，但他不知道该往哪里走。
narration.controls: 手柄已经到货。先试着让他按你的方向走一步。
narration.item: 这张卡带上只写了 7:55，它显然不是课程表。

act1_locked_entry.text: Excellent. You opened the game. Now kindly apply for permission to operate yourself.
act1_locked_entry.subtitleZh: 很好，你打开了游戏。现在请先去申请操作自己。
act1_locked_entry.delivery: dry female system voice, mock approval followed by weary bureaucratic disbelief

act1_identity_verified.text: Identity verified. The character finally has a name. The network remains unconvinced.
act1_identity_verified.subtitleZh: 登录成功。这个角色终于有名字了，仍然没联网。
act1_identity_verified.delivery: formal confirmation with a resigned, cutting final sentence

act1_phone_linked.text: Call connected. Using a student ID as a phone number is distressingly on brand.
act1_phone_linked.subtitleZh: 电话接通。用学号当电话号码，很有校园特色。
act1_phone_linked.delivery: matter-of-fact female system voice, tired emphasis on distressingly

act1_controls_installed.text: The controls have arrived. Sports has not yet approved the act of walking.
act1_controls_installed.subtitleZh: 方向键到货。体艺还没批准你走路。
act1_controls_installed.delivery: dry status report with restrained disbelief at the second sentence

act1_movement_enabled.text: Exercise started. Congratulations. You are now officially permitted to walk.
act1_movement_enabled.subtitleZh: 锻炼开始。恭喜，你现在被允许步行。
act1_movement_enabled.delivery: mock ceremony, controlled sarcasm, slightly tired final clause

act1_required_item_collected.text: Cartridge acquired. Keep walking. Apparently all four areas require your personal attendance.
act1_required_item_collected.subtitleZh: 卡带拿到了。继续把地图走完，四个区域一个都不能漏。
act1_required_item_collected.delivery: brisk instruction followed by resigned administrative annoyance

act1_map_completed.text: Map complete. The menu is open, and the system has formally recorded your ability to walk. A historic day.
act1_map_completed.subtitleZh: 全图已刷。游戏菜单已开放，系统已记录你会走路。
act1_map_completed.delivery: deadpan completion notice; let the final sentence land as exhausted mock celebration

prologue_narrator_intro.text: Well, that failed exactly as expected. Get up, go to class, and deal with it yourself. Best of luck. I'm leaving before this becomes my problem.
prologue_narrator_intro.subtitleZh: 嗯，失败得完全符合预期。起床，去上课，自己处理后果吧。祝你好运。趁这还没变成我的问题，我先走了。
subtitleSegmentsZh: 嗯，失败得完全符合预期。
起床，去上课，自己处理后果吧。
祝你好运。趁这还没变成我的问题，我先走了。
prologue_narrator_intro.delivery: British male narrator, dry and condescending; suppress a laugh at the opening, savour the failed result, offer conspicuously false concern, then exit with weary self-preservation

segments.text: Well, that failed exactly as expected.
Get up, go to class, and deal with it yourself.
Best of luck. I'm leaving before this becomes my problem.

prologue_narrator_caught.text: Hey! What exactly do you think you are doing? Let go of me!
prologue_narrator_caught.subtitleZh: 嘿！你到底在干什么？放开我！
prologue_narrator_caught.delivery: British male narrator losing composure, offended panic with a sharp final command

prologue_narrator_bargain.text: Oh, fine, fine! But first, take your hand off me!
prologue_narrator_bargain.subtitleZh: 哦，好吧，好吧！但你先把手放开！
prologue_narrator_bargain.delivery: British male narrator, exasperated surrender; stretch the final command through clenched impatience

act2_system_found_intro.text: Oh, damn it. You win, kid.
act2_system_found_intro.delivery: exasperated concession, restrained irritation, short pause before kid

act2_system_inventory_demand.subtitleZh: 行。把你的道具栏拿出来。

act2_system_inventory_missing.text: Wait. Where is your inventory? You cannot expect me to work empty-handed!
act2_system_inventory_missing.subtitleZh: 等等，你的道具栏呢？你总不能指望我空手干活！
act2_system_inventory_missing.delivery: incredulous escalation, quick second sentence, sharp final stress

act2_system_just_find_it.delivery: clipped impatience, one deliberate beat between words

act2_system_departure.text: You found it. Great. Then let us get moving.
act2_system_departure.subtitleZh: 你找到了。很好。那就出发。
act2_system_departure.delivery: brief relief turning into brisk momentum

act2_system_confession.text: I should be honest. I do not have permission to edit attendance records.
act2_system_confession.subtitleZh: 我得说实话。我没有修改签到记录的权限。
act2_system_confession.delivery: reluctant confession, lower register, slower second sentence

act2_system_friend.text: But I have a friend who might.
act2_system_friend.subtitleZh: 但我有个朋友，她也许有。
act2_system_friend.delivery: quiet confidence, hint of secrecy, soft ending

act2_system_library.text: If we still want your participation grade, we need to find her in the library.
act2_system_library.subtitleZh: 如果还想保住你的平时分，我们得去图书馆找她。
act2_system_library.delivery: practical urgency, clear emphasis on participation grade and library

act2_system_move_now.delivery: sharp check followed by a firm command

act2_character_cannot_hear.text: He cannot hear you. At the moment, he does not even have a name to answer to.
act2_character_cannot_hear.subtitleZh: 他听不到你说话。现在的他连一个能回应的名字都没有。
act2_character_cannot_hear.delivery: dry diagnostic report, lightly amused at the absurdity

act2_character_named.text: Name and student ID match. Good. He now knows who he is.
act2_character_named.subtitleZh: 姓名和学号一致。很好，他现在知道自己是谁了。

act2_exercise_started.text: He is walking. His sense of direction did not arrive with the exercise record.
act2_exercise_started.subtitleZh: 他走起来了。可惜方向感没有随锻炼记录一起到账。
act2_exercise_started.delivery: observational, dry punchline after a short pause

act2_push_triangle_collected.text: You removed an avatar from a notification. The notification center has filed no objection.
act2_push_triangle_collected.subtitleZh: 你从通知里拆下了一个头像。通知中心暂未提出异议。
act2_push_triangle_collected.delivery: curious first sentence, mock-official second sentence

act2_weather_water_collected.text: You collected one drop from the weather forecast. It has finally delivered a physical product.
act2_weather_water_collected.subtitleZh: 你从天气预报里接到了一滴水。它终于交付了实体产品。
act2_weather_water_collected.delivery: mild surprise followed by understated amusement

act2_mentor_line_stuck.text: That vertical line is stuck. Apparently, even your advisor's avatar has formatting requirements.
act2_mentor_line_stuck.subtitleZh: 那条竖线粘住了。看来导师头像也有自己的排版要求。
act2_mentor_line_stuck.delivery: dry annoyance, emphasize apparently and formatting requirements

act2_mentor_line_released.text: The water worked. The avatar is missing one vertical line, but it remains recognizable.
act2_mentor_line_released.subtitleZh: 水有效。头像少了一条竖线，但目前还能认出来。

act2_right_arrow_assembled.text: A triangle plus a vertical line. You now have an arrow that can move things to the right.
act2_right_arrow_assembled.subtitleZh: 一个三角形加一条竖线。现在你有了一支能把东西向右移的箭头。

act2_balance_shifted.text: The decimal point moved two places right. Six cents has temporarily acquired the dignity of six yuan.
act2_balance_shifted.subtitleZh: 小数点向右移动了两位。六分钱暂时获得了六元钱的尊严。
act2_balance_shifted.delivery: mock triumph, restrained delight on six yuan

act2_gamepad_purchase_rejected.text: You only have zero point zero six yuan. The seller rejected your hundred-installment plan.
act2_gamepad_purchase_rejected.subtitleZh: 你只有零点零六元。卖家拒绝了你分一百期付款的方案。

act2_gamepad_purchased.text: Sold for six yuan. Random walking disabled. Direction is now your responsibility.
act2_gamepad_purchased.subtitleZh: 六元成交。随机走动已关闭。方向现在归你负责。
act2_gamepad_purchased.delivery: decisive transaction confirmation, then crisp system status

dorm.title: 蓝田六舍 · W12
dorm.roommateMessage: 室友留言：你的校园卡压在右边书桌那摞纸旁边。

cc98ExchangePost.author: 手柄毕业生
cc98ExchangePost.title: 6块出游戏手柄，寝室自提
cc98ExchangePost.body: 方向键、摇杆和一个不太灵的 A 键都在。只收 6 元，不议价，也不接受 0.06 元分期。
